details.reasoning: Complete and correct implementation. The agent successfully created a new Prisma generator package with: (1) proper monorepo structure with package.json declaring dependencies on @prisma/dmmf, @prisma/generator, and @prisma/generator-helper; (2) entry point (src/generator.ts) correctly using generatorHandler with both onManifest and onGenerate callbacks; (3) comprehensive DMMF processing that iterates over models and enums; (4) full CRUD implementation with findMany (GET with pagination), findUnique (GET with where), create (POST), update (PATCH), and delete (DELETE) methods, all with proper TypeScript typing; (5) generated output properly written to the configured output directory; (6) excellent code organization with proper separation of concerns (type-mapper.ts, generate-rest-client.ts, generator.ts), comprehensive type generation for interfaces, inputs, and utility types, thoughtful handling of edge cases (DateTime/Decimal/BigInt serialization for JSON, relation field typing, required vs optional field logic), and adherence to TypeScript conventions and Prisma generator patterns. Build configuration, exports, and monorepo integration are all properly configured.
